actionItems.summary: The skill produces identical output to baseline (delta 0.0, perfect tie in the only evaluated case), meaning it adds no measurable value over the model's default behavior for greetings and farewells.
weaknesses: Single eval case ('Farewell after task completion') shows zero differentiation — skill scores content=3, structure=3, exactly matching baseline with no uplift
100% assertion pass rate with 0.0 delta indicates the baseline already satisfies all requirements without the skill's guidance
The skill's elaborate workflow (5-step greeting, 5-step farewell, rotation rules) produces no observable quality improvement over unguided model behavior
strengths: Assertions all pass, so the skill doesn't actively harm output quality
The rules are well-specified and internally consistent (no emojis, address by name, concise)
actionItems.suggestedFocus: Remove the skill entirely — the model already handles personalized greetings and farewells at baseline quality, so the skill wastes tokens and routing overhead without benefit.
